name: Rocky Rococo Pizza and Pasta

current_snapshot.ad_fund_headline: Up to 0.75% of gross sales weekly
current_snapshot.territory_headline: 1-mile radius exclusive territory around franchised location

initial_fees_by_format.refundability: Non-refundable after 10 days. Deposit refundable if no site found within 180 days (unless terminated for cause).

recurring_fees_raw.marketing_fund: Up to 0.75% of gross sales weekly
recurring_fees_raw.local_advertising: Up to 3.5% of gross sales (tiered: 1.5% no electronic, 2.5% radio, 3.5% TV)

royalty_detail.due_day: Friday following end of preceding week

conditional_reduction.mechanism: retroactive refund within 30 days of fiscal year-end
conditional_reduction.eligibility: Must be current on all royalty fees and other accounts payable to RFC or affiliates

royalty_detail.gross_sales_definition: Aggregate amount of all sales of food, beverages, goods, articles and any other merchandise or services made and rendered in conjunction with the RESTAURANT, including sales made at or away from the RESTAURANT, whether for cash or credit, but excluding all federal, state or municipal sales or service taxes paid by franchisee

marketing_fund_detail.fund_statement_available: Unaudited annual statement available upon written request
marketing_fund_detail.advertising_council_note: RFC reserves right to create advisory council in future

local_advertising_detail.increase_approval: Not less than 60% of participating restaurants
local_advertising_detail.self_spend_requirement: During any week not participating in Local Ad Fund, must independently spend applicable percentage
local_advertising_detail.expenditure_deadline: Within 90 days of close of weekly period
excluded_from_count: Cost of goods/services supplied without charge

grand_opening_requirement.period: 30 days before to 30 days after opening

transfer_fee_detail.covers: Credit checks, attorney fees, training for new franchisee (same as new franchisee training)

interest_detail.rate: Maximum by law or 1.5% per month (18% annualized)
interest_detail.applies_to: All overdue payments from date due until paid in full

audit_fee_detail.trigger: If audit reveals gross sales deficiency exceeding 2% of reported
audit_fee_detail.cost_to_franchisee: All audit costs, accountant/attorney fees, plus deficiency amount plus interest
audit_fee_detail.termination_right: RFC may terminate for submission of false reports or underreporting

raw.confidentiality_clauses: No franchisees have signed confidentiality clauses during the last 3 fiscal years

contract_burden.termination_with_cause: Only with cause. Curable: 60 days (10 days for non-payment). Non-curable: immediate for bankruptcy, abandonment, criminal misconduct, material misrepresentation, etc.
contract_burden.termination_by_franchisee: No provision in FA. FDA only: if unable to acquire site within 180 days.

territory_reality.headline: 1-mile radius exclusive territory around franchised location

raw.type: 1-mile radius exclusive territory around franchised location
carveouts: Major regional shopping mall locations (500K+ sq ft, 2+ dept store anchors) do not receive 1-mile protection
A mall within franchisee's 1-mile radius is not a violation
Central business district locations (RFC's sole judgment) receive no 1-mile protection
raw.not_exclusive_disclaimer: You will not receive an exclusive territory. You may face competition from other franchisees, from outlets that RFC owns, or from other channels of distribution or competitive brands that RFC controls.
raw.continuation_conditions: Not dependent on sales volume, market penetration, or any other contingency. Cannot be altered without written consent of both parties.
raw.right_of_first_refusal_for_additional: No option, right of first refusal, or similar right to acquire additional franchises within territory or contiguous territories.

state_overrides.note: FDD references state-specific addenda in boilerplate (p.4) but none are included despite registration in 5 states. The Item 17 table contains 'subject to State Law' qualifiers for noncompete, choice of forum, and integration clauses.

related_party_economics.rent_charged: None — RFC operates from facility leased by related party at no charge

deferred_tax.note: Deferred taxes relate to depreciation timing differences

income_statement_3yr.note: Strong top-line and bottom-line growth driven by franchised unit expansion

financial_strength.bankruptcy_flag: No bankruptcy required to be disclosed

raw.value: No litigation required to be disclosed
